predecessor: 10.9 (d) e2e content fixes — closed PARTIAL at 4a8c1c9, wave-3 partial at 793a974, wave-4 NOOP at a0eb959f, wave-5 INFRA-CLOSED at T+~4 min (no commits)
rationale: The 110-test e2e suite has 66 known-failing tests at 4f6e17c base. Running the full suite in CI is expensive (~10-15 min) and produces a confusing signal. Splitting into `smoke` (44 currently-passing + 5 wave-1 fixed) and `full` (all 110) gives a clear 'smoke green = safe to merge' signal + a 'full' diagnostic signal that doesn't block merges. This is configuration + docs work, NOT multi-spec test fixing — single orchestrator pass, no tmux workers needed.
estimatedDuration: 30-45 min wall-clock (mostly waiting on `pnpm playwright test` to finish)

edits: web-modern/playwright.config.ts (add @smoke tag handling, expose grep knob)
.github/workflows/ci.yml (or .github/workflows/*.yml — discover at audit time) (split smoke on PR, full on nightly cron)
.orchestration/phase10-10-ci-smoke-full-split/known-failures.md (NEW: per-spec root-cause + deferral status for the 66 known-failing tests)
nonEdits: web-modern/e2e/**/*.spec.ts (no test changes; this is meta-work)
any test source code, any test helper, _helpers.ts, etc.

tasks.title: Audit current e2e suite runtime + per-spec duration + retry counts at 879165b
tasks.command: cd /Users/samvelstepanyan/dev/A1-Suite-Local-ANT-queue/web-modern && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 timeout 1200 pnpm playwright test --reporter=line 2>&1 | tee /tmp/phase10-10-audit.log
tasks.passesIf: Audit file records total runtime, per-spec duration, pass/fail count (44/110/66 baseline), retry counts. Confirms no new failures introduced since 4f6e17c baseline.

tasks.title: Add @smoke tag to the 44 currently-passing specs + the 5 wave-1 fixed specs
tasks.command: manual: edit each of the ~50 spec files to add `test.describe.configure({ mode: 'parallel' });` + tag with `@smoke` annotation OR use Playwright's `test.info().annotations.push({ type: 'tag', description: '@smoke' })` pattern
tasks.input: audit-runtime.md (lists which specs are currently passing)
tasks.output: diff to web-modern/e2e/**/*.spec.ts (in a single commit)
tasks.passesIf: `pnpm playwright test --grep @smoke --reporter=line` runs only the tagged specs and passes 50/50

tasks.title: Add `test:e2e:smoke` and `test:e2e:full` scripts to web-modern/package.json
tasks.passesIf: `pnpm test:e2e:smoke` runs only the smoke specs, `pnpm test:e2e:full` runs all

tasks.title: Split CI: smoke on every PR, full on nightly cron
tasks.command: manual: edit .github/workflows/ci.yml (discover the exact file at audit time)
tasks.passesIf: PR job uses `pnpm test:e2e:smoke`; nightly cron uses `pnpm test:e2e:full`; both run vitest + typecheck + build as before

tasks.title: Document the 66 known-failing tests in known-failures.md
tasks.command: manual: write a per-spec table from the audit data + the wave-1/2/3/4 postmortems in STATE.md
tasks.passesIf: Document covers all 66 failing tests with per-spec root-cause, deferral status, and 'next action' recommendation. This becomes the work-list for any future 10.9 (d) wave-N attempt or a different approach.

tasks.title: Verify: run smoke + full locally, confirm split works
tasks.command: cd /Users/samvelstepanyan/dev/A1-Suite-Local-ANT-queue/web-modern && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 timeout 600 pnpm test:e2e:smoke 2>&1 | tee /tmp/phase10-10-smoke-verify.log && timeout 1200 pnpm test:e2e:full 2>&1 | tee /tmp/phase10-10-full-verify.log
tasks.passesIf: Smoke passes 50/50, full matches the 44/110 baseline (no regressions from the tagging work)
